variants: Asha Venkataraman, originally from Cardinal's Rest, has made her home in Cottonbirch Dell. She attended Lumen Fields University, where she laid the groundwork for her career. Currently, she is part of the team at Westfork Mercantile, effectively utilizing the Georgian alphabet as her working or professional language. Asha's path from her birthplace to her current professional role illustrates her dedication to her craft and community.
